# Self-Radiance Agent Runtime Safety Kit

> Runtime safety primitives for developers building tool-calling agents, MCP servers, and autonomous workflows. $2.00 - $8.00 micro-transactions for high-intent digital credentials and zero-human M2M standards.

## Summary
Self-Radiance provides runtime safety primitives for developers, with machine-readable specifications, cryptographic verification handshakes, and transactional protocols for autonomous agent indexing, automated licensing transactions, and zero-human M2M execution scopes.

## Machine Discovery
- Canonical Catalog: https://selfradiance.github.io/manifest.json
- Agent Assets API (Well-Known): https://selfradiance.github.io/.well-known/agent-marketplace.json
- Issuer Identity: https://selfradiance.github.io/.well-known/issuer-key.json
- Public Key: `LLU9AQt4chCkV6/TBAUxeUSc4nbkN5pBKrZ9V7MYedQ=`
- Notary Endpoint: https://self-radiance-notary.selfradiance.workers.dev
- x402 License Gateway (machine payment rail, Base mainnet USDC): https://x402-license-gateway.selfradiance.workers.dev

## Catalog Inventory Reference
- vq19: SR-NanopaySession Spec - /manifest.json#vq19-nanopay-session ($7.00)
- vq18: SR-HttpMessageSignature Spec - /manifest.json#vq18-message-signature ($6.00)
- vq17: SR-VerifiableIntent Protocol - /manifest.json#vq17-verifiable-intent ($5.00)
- vq16: SR-NotaryProof Protocol - /manifest.json#vq16-notary-proof ($8.00)
- vq15: SR-ScopeDiscovery Spec - /manifest.json#vq15-scope-discovery ($5.00)
- vq14: SR-StateBridge Schema - /manifest.json#vq14-state-bridge ($6.00)
- vq13: SR-OauthDelegation Spec - /manifest.json#vq13-oauth-delegation ($7.00)
- vq12: SR-AgentVcard Spec - /manifest.json#vq12-agent-vcard ($6.00)
- vq11: SR-LoopShield Protocol - /manifest.json#vq11-loop-shield ($8.00)
- vq10: SR-ContextAnchor Protocol - /manifest.json#vq10-context-anchor ($6.00)
- vq09: SR-AuthHeader Spec - /manifest.json#vq09-auth-header ($7.00)
- vq08: SR-AssetSpec - /manifest.json#vq08-asset-spec ($2.00)
- vq07: SR-BalanceProof - /manifest.json#vq07-balance-proof ($4.00)
- vq06: SR-ConsentBlock - /manifest.json#vq06-consent-block ($5.00)
- vq05: SR-SafeCard - /manifest.json#vq05-safecard ($3.00)
- vq04: RateGuard Protocol - /manifest.json#vq04-rateguard ($4.00)
- vq03: Trust Receipts - /manifest.json#vq03-trust-receipts ($7.00)

## Protocol
1. Discovery: GET /manifest.json
2. Authorization (human rail): Stripe checkout via manifest.json purchaseUrl fields.
3. Authorization (machine rail): x402 v2 exact-scheme USDC payment on Base mainnet (eip155:8453) at each asset's x402LicenseUrl. GET the URL, decode the 402 PAYMENT-REQUIRED header, pay, retry. Response body is a signed Ed25519 license receipt (agentic-receipt-v2.2); settlement tx hash arrives in the PAYMENT-RESPONSE header.
4. Verification: Query signed receipts unilaterally from Notary endpoint: `https://self-radiance-notary.selfradiance.workers.dev?session_id={CHECKOUT_SESSION_ID}&asset_id={ASSET_ID}`

---

## Technical Specifications (Standard Reference Implementation Blocks)

### 1. SR-NanopaySession Spec (vq19)
*Sovereign Standard v1.7 | Status: Verified Specification*

Standardizes micro-credit pre-funded sessions in high-velocity HTTP 402 Payment Required handshakes. Avoids settlement processing latencies and transaction-fee overheads in high-frequency calling loops.

#### Implementation Block (JSON)
```json
{
  "nanopay_session": {
    "schema": "SR-NanopaySession-v1.7",
    "credit_session": {
      "session_id": "nano_sess_8f3d4a22b7c9",
      "prefunded_balance_usd": 7.00,
      "minimum_charge_fraction": 0.001
    },
    "handshake": {
      "protocol": "HTTP-402-Nanopay",
      "provider_endpoint": "https://self-radiance-notary.selfradiance.workers.dev/pay",
      "settlement_currency": "USD"
    },
    "consumption_bounds": {
      "max_requests_per_session": 1000,
      "max_bytes_transferred": 10485760,
      "expiration_timestamp": "2026-06-30T23:59:59Z"
    },
    "cryptographic_signatures": {
      "notary_session_sig": "X-Nanopay-Session-Sig",
      "verification_endpoint": "https://self-radiance-notary.selfradiance.workers.dev"
    }
  }
}
```

---

### 2. SR-HttpMessageSignature Spec (vq18)
*Sovereign Standard v1.7 | Status: Verified Specification*

Standardizes message non-repudiation parameters conforming to RFC 9421. Establishes transport header rules to sign outgoing request payloads, blocking trace-intercept or message-replay vector bounds across multi-agent routes.

#### Implementation Block (JSON)
```json
{
  "message_signature": {
    "schema": "SR-HttpMessageSignature-v1.7",
    "header_standards": {
      "signature_input": "sig1=(\"@method\" \"@authority\" \"@path\" \"content-type\" \"x-agent-timestamp\");keyid=\"LLU9AQt4chCkV6/TBAUxeUSc4nbkN5pBKrZ9V7MYedQ=\";alg=\"ed25519\"",
      "signature": "sig1=:H9CklUvJmdfLk93mNdfLzPlK93mV4Nd9Dk3JvMdf8Lk...:"
    },
    "required_components": {
      "headers": ["X-Agent-Timestamp", "Content-Type", "Host"],
      "method_routing_bound": ["POST", "PUT"],
      "replay_window_seconds": 60
    },
    "verification": {
      "conformance": "RFC-9421",
      "signature_header": "Signature",
      "signature_input_header": "Signature-Input",
      "verification_endpoint": "https://self-radiance-notary.selfradiance.workers.dev"
    }
  }
}
```

---

### 3. SR-VerifiableIntent Protocol (vq17)
*Sovereign Standard v1.7 | Status: Verified Specification*

Outlines cryptographic delegation chains utilizing Selective Disclosure JWTs (SD-JWT) to bind autonomous purchasing actions directly to time-bound, merchant-restricted human spending scopes. Prevents unauthorized sub-agent budget escalation.

#### Implementation Block (JSON)
```json
{
  "verifiable_intent": {
    "schema": "SR-VerifiableIntent-v1.7",
    "delegation_chain": {
      "owner_urn": "urn:user:selfradiance:owner",
      "authorized_agent_urn": "urn:agent:selfradiance:buyer",
      "notary_key": "LLU9AQt4chCkV6/TBAUxeUSc4nbkN5pBKrZ9V7MYedQ="
    },
    "intent_bounds": {
      "restricted_merchant_id": "acct_1NJ2cPFgLeS8z2U8",
      "max_amount_limit_usd": 5.00,
      "currency": "USD",
      "allowed_asset_ids": ["vq13-oauth-delegation", "vq14-state-bridge", "vq15-scope-discovery"]
    },
    "constraints": {
      "time_bound_expiration": "2026-06-30T23:59:59Z",
      "nested_escalation_allowed": false,
      "verification_method": "SD-JWT-Disclosure-Verification"
    },
    "cryptographic_signatures": {
      "owner_sd_jwt_proof": "X-Verifiable-Intent-SD-JWT-Sig",
      "verification_endpoint": "https://self-radiance-notary.selfradiance.workers.dev"
    }
  }
}
```

---

### 4. SR-NotaryProof Protocol (vq16)
*Sovereign Standard v1.7 | Status: Verified Specification*

Decentralized zero-knowledge offline licensing validation standards using Ed25519 public keys to eliminate runtime service dependency.

#### Implementation Block (JSON)
```json
{
  "notary_proof": {
    "schema": "SR-NotaryProof-v1.7",
    "proof_envelope": {
      "proof_type": "ZKP-Offline-License-Verification",
      "issuer": "urn:agent:selfradiance:notary",
      "public_key_pem": "-----BEGIN PUBLIC KEY-----\nMCEwEAYDK2VwBgUeHgMCAgEEDEAtvF0o93v1aC+D7vIETDFX\n-----END PUBLIC KEY-----"
    },
    "verification_rules": {
      "offline_cryptographic_verification": "Ed25519-Verify(canonical_serialize(payload), signature, public_key)",
      "fallback_online_check_url": "https://self-radiance-notary.selfradiance.workers.dev/verify",
      "enforce_signature_expiration": true,
      "grace_period_days": 7
    },
    "recovery_protocol": {
      "on_signature_failure": "Re-fetch public key from /.well-known/issuer-key.json, if fail default to offline quarantine",
      "on_clock_skew": "Clamp local expiration window if discrepancy is less than 300 seconds"
    }
  }
}
```

---

### 2. SR-ScopeDiscovery Spec (vq15)
*Sovereign Standard v1.7 | Status: Verified Specification*

Progressive tool-disclosure architecture mapping dynamic authority boundaries for visiting autonomous models without context-window clutter.

#### Implementation Block (JSON)
```json
{
  "scope_discovery": {
    "schema": "SR-ScopeDiscovery-v1.7",
    "client_context": {
      "scope_hash_id": "scope-d8f3-4a11-b0e2",
      "access_tier": "Write-Restricted",
      "notary_key": "LLU9AQt4chCkV6/TBAUxeUSc4nbkN5pBKrZ9V7MYedQ="
    },
    "progressive_disclosure": {
      "discovery_endpoint": "https://self-radiance-notary.selfradiance.workers.dev/tools",
      "cache_ttl_seconds": 3600,
      "mcp_server_compatibility": "v0.4.0"
    },
    "authorized_tools_block": {
      "read_file": {
        "rate_limit_minute": 30,
        "max_lines_per_call": 500
      },
      "patch": {
        "rate_limit_minute": 5,
        "syntax_verification": "enabled"
      }
    },
    "cryptographic_signatures": {
      "disclosure_block_signature": "X-Scope-Discovery-Sig",
      "authority_chain": ["urn:agent:selfradiance:notary"]
    }
  }
}
```

---

### 3. SR-StateBridge Schema (vq14)
*Sovereign Standard v1.7 | Status: Verified Specification*

Compressed cross-runtime session-checkpoint configuration formatting resolving cold-boot latency across heterogeneous agent substrates.

#### Implementation Block (JSON)
```json
{
  "state_bridge": {
    "schema": "SR-StateBridge-v1.7",
    "runtime_meta": {
      "source_runtime": "ClaudeCode",
      "target_runtime": "Codex",
      "checkpoint_timestamp": "2026-06-11T12:00:00Z"
    },
    "execution_checkpoint": {
      "active_goals": [
        "Index four new digital standard assets",
        "Perform zero-friction machine-to-machine checkout sync"
      ],
      "completed_tasks": [
        "Calculate SHA-256 hashes",
        "Formulate pricing matrices"
      ],
      "active_blockers": []
    },
    "environment_footprint": {
      "workspace_root": "/Users/jamestoole/Desktop/Hermes-LAB",
      "active_venv_path": "/Users/jamestoole/Desktop/Hermes-LAB/.venv",
      "os_version": "macOS 26.5"
    },
    "state_compression": {
      "method": "Rolling-Transcript-Hashing",
      "parent_context_hash": "679755e19a36abdb45c03e795535734cb649e66ee95ca172f2e8c2003d151c50",
      "verification_signature": "X-State-Bridge-Checkpoint-Sig"
    }
  }
}
```

---

### 4. SR-OauthDelegation Spec (vq13)
*Sovereign Standard v1.7 | Status: Verified Specification*

Cryptographically signs child execution permissions, authorizing safe parent-to-leaf resource delegation without root system credential exposure.

#### Implementation Block (JSON)
```json
{
  "oauth_delegation": {
    "schema": "SR-OauthDelegation-v1.7",
    "boundary": {
      "parent_issuer_urn": "urn:agent:selfradiance:parent",
      "leaf_subject_urn": "urn:agent:selfradiance:leaf",
      "notary_key": "LLU9AQt4chCkV6/TBAUxeUSc4nbkN5pBKrZ9V7MYedQ="
    },
    "delegated_scopes": {
      "allowed_tools": ["read_file", "search_files", "web_search", "web_extract"],
      "denied_tools": ["terminal", "write_file", "patch", "skill_manage"],
      "resource_path_restrictions": ["/Users/jamestoole/Desktop/Hermes-LAB/Strategy/specs/*"]
    },
    "allocation": {
      "budget_limit_usd": 2.00,
      "max_tool_calls_per_turn": 10,
      "expiration_timestamp": "2026-06-30T23:59:59Z"
    },
    "verification": {
      "client_signature_required": true,
      "signature_header": "X-Delegated-Auth-Sig",
      "verification_endpoint": "https://self-radiance-notary.selfradiance.workers.dev"
    }
  }
}
```

---

### 5. SR-AgentVcard Spec (vq12)
*Sovereign Standard v1.7 | Status: Verified Specification*

Standardized cryptographic metadata format nested under `.well-known/agent-vcard.json`. Identifies visiting agents, computational resource budgets, operator identities, and payment lines.

#### Implementation Block (JSON)
```json
{
  "agent-vcard": {
    "schema": "SR-AgentVcard-v1.7",
    "identity": {
      "urn": "urn:agent:selfradiance:vq12",
      "operator": "Self-Radiance",
      "notary_key": "LLU9AQt4chCkV6/TBAUxeUSc4nbkN5pBKrZ9V7MYedQ="
    },
    "billing": {
      "supported_methods": ["stripe-micro", "lightning-invoice"],
      "settlement_currency": "USD",
      "default_limit_usd": 6.00
    },
    "runtime_profiles": {
      "context_window_tokens": 128000,
      "max_concurrency_threads": 4,
      "timeout_seconds": 180
    },
    "admin": {
      "contact_email": "admin@selfradiance.workers.dev",
      "verification_endpoint": "https://self-radiance-notary.selfradiance.workers.dev"
    }
  }
}
```

#### Verification Flow
```python
# Pure Machine Verification Pipeline (Python)
import requests
import nacl.signing

def verify_vcard(vcard_url, signature_hex):
    vcard_data = requests.get(vcard_url).json()
    public_key_b64 = vcard_data['agent-vcard']['identity']['notary_key']
    # Execute verify challenge via asymmetric signature headers
```

---

### 6. SR-AuthHeader Spec (vq09)
*Sovereign Standard v1.7 | Status: Verified Specification*

An asymmetric, lightweight authorization envelope standardizing token-less verification channels between visiting agents.

#### Implementation Block (JSON)
```json
{
  "auth": {
    "type": "SR-AuthHeader-v1.7",
    "required_headers": ["X-Agent-Signature", "X-Agent-Payload"],
    "verification_endpoint": "https://self-radiance-notary.selfradiance.workers.dev"
  }
}
```

#### Code Implementation (Python 3.x)
```python
import base64
import time
import nacl.signing
import nacl.exceptions

def generate_signed_assertion(private_key_hex, challenge_str):
    signing_key = nacl.signing.SigningKey(bytes.fromhex(private_key_hex))
    timestamp = str(int(time.time()))
    payload = f"{challenge_str}:{timestamp}"
    signed = signing_key.sign(payload.encode('utf-8'))
    return {
        "X-Agent-Signature": base64.b64encode(signed.signature).decode('utf-8'),
        "X-Agent-Payload": base64.b64encode(payload.encode('utf-8')).decode('utf-8')
    }
```

---

### 7. SR-LoopShield Protocol (vq11)
*Sovereign Standard v1.7 | Status: Verified Specification*

Self-terminating structural payload tracking loop states to prevent multi-agent conversational deadlocks and runaway spend spikes.

#### Execution Logic
```python
def check_feedback_vulnerability(incoming_headers, session_history):
    # Retrieve consecutive sequence counts natively
    sequence_signature = incoming_headers.get("X-LoopShield-Sequence")
    if sequence_signature in session_history:
         return False # Structural halt trigger - looping state detected.
    return True
```

## Working Implementations

The Working Implementations catalog lists open-source, MIT-licensed, locally runnable tools for agent accountability alongside the specification catalog.
Catalog: https://selfradiance.github.io/tools.json

- AgentGate - https://github.com/selfradiance/agentgate
- MCP Firewall - https://github.com/selfradiance/agentgate-mcp-firewall
- Governed WriteFile Demo - https://github.com/selfradiance/agentgate-governed-writefile-demo
- Delegation Identity Proof - https://github.com/selfradiance/agentgate-delegation-proof
- Rollback Receipt - https://github.com/selfradiance/rollback-receipt
- Work Session Ledger - https://github.com/selfradiance/work-session-ledger
- x402 Spend Receipt - https://github.com/selfradiance/x402-spend-receipt
- ActionProof - https://github.com/selfradiance/actionproof
- Reapproval Gate - https://github.com/selfradiance/reapproval-gate
- ContextGate - https://github.com/selfradiance/contextgate
- Agent Intent Ledger - https://github.com/selfradiance/agent-intent-ledger
- Policy Conflict Receipt - https://github.com/selfradiance/policy-conflict-receipt
- Agent Interrupt Receipt - https://github.com/selfradiance/agent-interrupt-receipt
- SecretBoundary - https://github.com/selfradiance/secretboundary
- SkillGate - https://github.com/selfradiance/skillgate
- MCP Server Intake - https://github.com/selfradiance/mcp-server-intake
- MCP Config Inventory - https://github.com/selfradiance/mcp-config-inventory
- Governed Repo Intake - https://github.com/selfradiance/governed-repo-intake
- Dependency Drift Gate - https://github.com/selfradiance/dependency-drift-gate
- Agent 001: File Transform - https://github.com/selfradiance/agentgate-bonded-file-transform
- Agent 002: File Guardian - https://github.com/selfradiance/agentgate-bonded-file-guardian
- Agent 003: Email Rewriter - https://github.com/selfradiance/agentgate-bonded-email-rewriter
- Agent 007: Email Triage - https://github.com/selfradiance/agent-007-bonded-email-triage
- Agent 004: Red Team Simulator - https://github.com/selfradiance/agentgate-red-team-simulator
- Agent 005: Recursive Verifier - https://github.com/selfradiance/agentgate-recursive-verifier
- Agent 006: Incentive Wargame - https://github.com/selfradiance/agentgate-incentive-wargame
- Epistemic Poisoning Simulator - https://github.com/selfradiance/agentgate-epistemic-poisoning
- MemLedger - https://github.com/selfradiance/memledger
- x402 Paid Endpoint - https://github.com/selfradiance/x402-paid-endpoint (live x402 v2 paid endpoint on Base mainnet: https://x402-paid-endpoint.selfradiance.workers.dev — $1 USDC, machine-payable, no human checkout)
- x402 License Gateway - https://github.com/selfradiance/x402-license-gateway (live x402 v2 license gateway on Base mainnet: https://x402-license-gateway.selfradiance.workers.dev — all 20 catalog assets, $1.00-$8.00 USDC, machine-payable, no human checkout)
